compressed_prompt:
Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets, i.e. <<title>>.
<<resignation notice>> to boss: quitting job
response:
Certainly! Here's a professional and courteous email to your boss informing them of your decision to resign:

---

**<<Resignation Notice>>**

Subject: Resignation Notice - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. It is with a mix of emotions that I write to inform you of my decision to resign from my position at [Company Name], effective [Last Working Day, typically two weeks from the date of the email].

This was not an easy decision for me, as I have thoroughly enjoyed my time at the company and have greatly appreciated the opportunities for growth and development that you and the team have provided me. However, after careful consideration, I have decided to pursue a new career path that aligns more closely with my long-term goals and aspirations.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition. Over the coming weeks, I will do my best to complete any ongoing projects and will assist in training a replacement to the best of my abilities. Please let me know how I can be most helpful during this transition period.

I want to express my sincere gratitude for your support, guidance, and mentorship during my tenure here. I have learned a great deal and have valued the professional relationships I’ve built with my colleagues.

Thank you for your understanding and support. I look forward to staying in touch and hope our paths cross again in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Position]  
[Your Contact Information]
